data.name: BaseColor_Desc
data.value: Specifies the base color for transparency.

data.name: EndColor_Desc
data.value: Specifies the end color of the gradient. The range between the base color and this color will be keyed.

data.name: MainKeyColor_Desc
data.value: Select the primary color to be keyed. Choose according to your background color.

data.name: Tolerance_Desc
data.value: Tolerance range for the key color. 0% targets only the exact selected color.

data.name: LuminanceMix_Desc
data.value: Adjusts how much luminance is used for keying. Higher values help separate bright areas from the background.

data.name: EdgeSoftness_Desc
data.value: Adjusts the softness of the transparent boundary.

data.name: ClipBlack_Desc
data.value: Adjusts the black level of the matte. Useful for removing background noise.

data.name: ClipWhite_Desc
data.value: Adjusts the white level of the matte. Helps keep the foreground (especially luminous parts) solid.

data.name: EdgeBlur_Desc
data.value: Blurs the edges of the matte to make them smoother. Good for fixing rough edges.

data.name: GradientStrength_Desc
data.value: Adjusts the strength of the gradient effect. 0% is base color only, 100% is a full gradient to the end color.

data.name: GradientAngle_Desc
data.value: Specifies the direction of the gradient in degrees.

data.name: ReplaceColor_Desc
data.value: Specifies the color to replace the removed area.

data.name: ReplaceIntensity_Desc
data.value: Intensity of filling the removed area with the replace color.

data.name: PreserveLuminance_Desc
data.value: How much of the original luminance to preserve when replacing color.

data.name: ColorSpace_Desc
data.value: Selects the color space used to calculate color distance when the main key color is set to custom.

data.name: HueRange_Desc
data.value: Hue tolerance range when using HSV/LCH color spaces.

data.name: SaturationThreshold_Desc
data.value: Colors with saturation below this value will be compared by brightness, ignoring saturation.

data.name: LuminanceRange_Desc
data.value: Luminance difference tolerance when using RGB/YUV color spaces.

data.name: SpillSuppression_Desc
data.value: Removes background color casting (spill) on the subject.

data.name: EdgeBalance_Desc
data.value: Adjusts the boundary inwards/outwards. Positive moves inward, negative moves outward.

data.name: Despot_Desc
data.value: Removes small noise (holes or specks) from the matte.

data.name: Erode_Desc
data.value: Expands or shrinks the matte boundaries. Useful for removing thin fringes on edges.

data.name: ExceptionColor1_Desc
data.value: Color to exclude from keying. If set to transparent, this function is disabled.

data.name: ExceptionColor2_Desc
data.value: gradient end color to exclude. Colors within this range will resist being keyed.

data.name: ExceptionTolerance_Desc
data.value: Tolerance range for exception colors. Higher values protect more colors.

data.name: ExceptionGradientStrength_Desc
data.value: Strength of the exception color gradient effect.

data.name: ExceptionGradientAngle_Desc
data.value: Direction of the exception color gradient.

data.name: EdgeDesaturation_Desc
data.value: Reduces edge color bleeding for more natural compositing.

data.name: KeyCleanup_Desc
data.value: Adjusts the boundary of the keyed matte. Negative shrinks

data.name: EdgeDetection_Desc
data.value: Strength of preserving edge details. Higher makes edges sharper but may increase noise.

data.name: Denoise_Desc
data.value: Removes fine noise from the matte.

data.name: Feathering_Desc
data.value: Feathers matte edges to blend them into the background.

data.name: TranslucentDespill_Desc
data.value: Removes background spill in translucent areas like glass, smoke, or motion blur.

data.name: TransparencyQuality_Desc
data.value: Improves processing quality for highly transparent areas (like smoke).

data.name: AlphaBlendAdjustment_Desc
data.value: Adjusts blending logic between foreground and background.

data.name: TargetResidualColor_Desc
data.value: Specifies the residual background color you want to correct.

data.name: CorrectedColor_Desc
data.value: Converts target residual color to this.

data.name: ResidualColorCorrection_Desc
data.value: Converts remaining keyed background colors into another color.

data.name: CorrectionTolerance_Desc
data.value: Tolerance for color correction. Higher values affect more colors.

data.name: ForegroundBrightness_Desc
data.value: Adjusts brightness of the foreground (keyed element) after keying.

data.name: ForegroundContrast_Desc
data.value: Adjusts contrast of the foreground after keying.

data.name: ForegroundSaturation_Desc
data.value: Adjusts saturation of the foreground after keying.

data.name: IsCompleteKey_Desc
data.value: Makes key fully transparent without retaining luminance. Disables despill.

data.name: QualityPreset_Desc
data.value: Select processing quality. Higher quality is more demanding on performance.

data.name: DebugMode_Desc
data.value: Displays different effect processing stages for debugging.

data.name: ValidationRule_Error_ClipBlackWhiteInverted
data.value: Clip Black value is greater than or equal to Clip White value. The mask will not be generated correctly.

data.name: ValidationRule_Warning_ToleranceExtremelyLow
data.value: Tolerance is extremely low, so the intended range may not be keyed.

data.name: ValidationRule_Warning_ToleranceExtremelyHigh
data.value: Tolerance is extremely high, so unintended parts of the foreground may be keyed.

data.name: ValidationRule_Warning_SoftnessWithoutTolerance
data.value: Edge Softness requires tolerance to be increased to function properly.

data.name: ValidationRule_Warning_HighLuminanceMix
data.value: If Luminance Mix is too high

data.name: ValidationRule_Warning_ClipAndSoftnessConflict
data.value: Both Clip settings and Edge Softness are set high. This may result in unintended hard edges.

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_GradientStrengthZero
data.value: Gradient Strength is 0%, so "End Color" and "Gradient Angle" have no effect.

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_SpillSuppressionWithCustom
data.value: Spill Suppression is most effective when the main key color is Green, Blue, or Red.

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_ReplaceIntensityZero
data.value: Replace Intensity is 0%, so "Replace Color" and "Preserve Luminance" have no effect.

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_ReplaceColorTransparent
data.value: Replace Color is transparent. This has the effect of reducing opacity of the removed area.

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_ColorSpaceForCustomOnly
data.value: Color Space changes are applied only when the main key color is set to "Custom".

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_HueRangeForSpecificSpaces
data.value: Hue Range is valid only when Color Space is "HSV" or "LCH".

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_SaturationThresholdForHsvOnly
data.value: Saturation Threshold is valid only when Color Space is HSV.

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_LuminanceRangeForSpecificSpaces
data.value: Luminance Range is valid only when Color Space is RGB or YUV.

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_CompleteKeyBypassesQuality
data.value: In Complete Key mode, Spill Suppression, Edge Desaturation, and Preserve Luminance are disabled.

data.name: ValidationRule_Warning_ExceptionColorTransparent
data.value: Exception Color is set to transparent, so "Exception Settings" will not function.

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_ExceptionGradientStrengthZero
data.value: Exception Gradient Strength is 0%, so "Exception Color 2 (End)" and "Gradient Angle" have no effect.

data.name: ValidationRule_Info_ResidualColorCorrectionZero
data.value: Residual Color Correction intensity is 0%, so "Target Residual Color" and "Corrected Color" have no effect.

data.name: ValidationRule_Warning_GradientStrengthHigh
data.value: If Gradient Strength is too high, unintended areas may be keyed. If issues occur with high-transparency areas like smoke, increase "Transparency Quality".

data.name: ValidationRule_Performance_HighQualitySettings
data.value: Heavy processing is combined in High Quality mode. This may impact performance.

data.name: UpdateChecker_NewVersionAvailable
data.value: New version v{0} is available. (Current: v{1})
